What we do

Four ways we build
leverage into your business.

From a single automation to a full technology transformation — we scope tightly and ship fast. Fixed prices. No lock-in.

Book a discovery call →
01

AI & Automation

Lead capture, document processing, AI agents, CRM integration, reporting — all automated. Your team focuses on growth, not admin.

n8nMakeGPT-4oClaudeWhatsApp API
EXPLORE SERVICE →
02

Custom Web & Mobile Apps

React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, PHP, native iOS & Android. Production-grade, shipped in weeks not months.

ReactNext.jsPythonPHPiOSAndroid
EXPLORE SERVICE →
03

CTO Advisory

Fractional CTO for companies that need senior technical leadership without a full-time hire. Architecture, team, strategy.

Tech strategyArchitectureTeam leadership
EXPLORE SERVICE →
04

Digital Transformation

Full-scope digital audits and transformation programmes. We map inefficiencies and implement the systems to fix them.

Digital auditProcess redesignChange mgmt
EXPLORE SERVICE →
Automation library — sample only

Hundreds of automations.
Real results.

A sample of what's live in production. We've built hundreds of automations across every industry — the only limit is what your business needs.

AI Lead Response
GPT-4o · WhatsApp API · n8n · HubSpot

Where we work

Three offices,
one team.

Dubai, Bucharest, and Milan — we operate across time zones so your project never stops moving.

Dubai, UAE
HQ · Gulf operations
Sun–Thu · 09:00–18:00 GST (GMT+4)
Bucharest, Romania
Engineering hub · EU deliveries
Mon–Fri · 09:00–18:00 EET (GMT+2)
Milan, Italy
European clients · Partnerships
Mon–Fri · 09:00–18:00 CET (GMT+1)

is right for you?

Book a free 30-minute call. We'll listen, ask the right questions, and tell you exactly what we'd recommend.
